words.def: (virology) ultramicroscopic infectious agent that replicates itself only within cells of living hosts; many are pathogenic; a piece of nucleic acid (DNA or RNA) wrapped in a thin coat of protein
an important question that is in dispute and must be settled
words.zh: n. 發行, 問題, 後果, 流出, 出口, 爭端

words.def: a person who makes use of a thing; someone who uses or employs something
words.zh: n. 使用者；受限使用者（user的複數）

words.def: a growth in strength or number or importance
words.zh: n. 上升, 增加, 上漲, 高地, 升高, 出現

words.def: having or feeling no doubt or uncertainty; confident and assured
words.zh: a. 確信, 必然的, 必定的

words.def: term of address for a man

words.zh: n. 使用, 習慣, 使用價值, 用法, 使用權
